sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The green center is at rows 38-39, cols 10-11. It's in the bottom container. The game is not over.
Looking at the image, I see the green center is in the bottom container. The blue dots are at rows 34-37, cols 8-11. The red block is at rows 30-33, cols 12-17.
I've been trying to move the green center to the middle row, but it's stuck in the bottom container. The issue might be that the green center can only move up when it's at the bottom of the container (rows 42-43), and the path to the middle row is clear.
Let me try a different approach. Let me move the green center to the bottom of the container (rows 42-43), then try moving it up. If the path is clear (no blue dots blocking), it should move to the middle row.
First, let me move the green center down to the bottom of the container.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move green center down to bottom of container
action(['DOWN', 'DOWN', 'DOWN', 'DOWN'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
